MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2010: APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT. A COURTESY COPY OF "DEFENDANT CAROLYN GAGE, NOTICE; MOTION ; AND MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE" WHICH WAS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT WAS DELIVERED TO DEPT. 206. AN ATTORNEY SPECIALLY APPEARED (DID NOT SIGN IN OR LEAVE A BUSINESS CARD) FOR ATTORNEY MICHAEL PINES WHO REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT MR. PINES IS REPRESENTING THE DEFENDANT. THERE WAS NO RECORD OF A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY ON FILE. CASE WAS CONTINUED FROM THE MORNING SESSION TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO APPEAR IN THE AFTERNOON WITH COUNSEL READY TO SUBSTITUTE IN THE CASE AS REPRESENTED BY ATTORNEY THAT SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT DURING THE MORNING SESSION. CASE WAS RECALLED AT 1:40 PM AND THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES FOR DEFENDANT. THIS CASE WAS ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-15-2010 AT 1:45 PM IN DEPT. 602, CHARLENE PANDOVANI KIESSELBACH, FOR PROVE-UP HEARING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CAROLYN GAGE'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
